_comment: Mutation testing for the pure lib/ modules — measures whether the unit/property tests actually kill injected bugs. Runs weekly (non-blocking), like fuzz. See docs/testing.md.
_mutate_comment: Logic-bearing modules backed by dedicated unit tests. gestures.ts is included for its pure helpers (shouldCommit/rubberBand/clamp); its swipeNavigate DOM action is inline-disabled (`// Stryker disable all`) because Stryker's vitest runner drives only the `node` project, not the jsdom one that covers it. Omitted: syllabus-icons.ts and sdgs.ts (presentation data tables — mutating colour/title literals reflects data, not a test weakness) and contrast.ts (no dedicated test to measure against).
